name: Patelitos (Little Fruit Pies)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dried fruit, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the cooked fruit, then add sugar, honey, and cinnamon. Stir well.
- Note: Any dried fruit, such as apricots, peaches, pears, currants, prunes, or raisins may be used.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Add Crisco and cut in until the mixture resembles fine meal.
4. Slowly add cold water until the dough is easy to roll.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch and cut into 4-inch rounds.
6. Place 1 tablespoon of fruit filling on one half of each round, fold over, and seal the other half of the round by pinching the edges firmly.
7. Prick several holes in the tops with the tines of a fork.
8. Beat the egg with milk and brush the tops of the pies.
9. Bake for 15 minutes or until lightly browned. Makes 10 Pastelitos.
